onboarding.title: Welcome to VM Integral Massage
onboarding.subtitle: Please complete this form before your first session. Your information is kept strictly confidential.
onboarding.how_heard: How did you hear about us?

onboarding.allergies_details: If yes, please list your allergies
onboarding.medications_details: If yes, please list them with dosage
onboarding.had_post_surgical_massage_before: Post-surgical massage performed before contacting us?

onboarding.existing_conditions_placeholder: fibrosis, adhesions, wounds, lymphedema, varicose veins...
onboarding.other_health_concerns: Other health concerns or medical history?
onboarding.contract_text: I understand that massage therapy is not a substitute for medical treatment. I certify that I have disclosed all known medical conditions and take full responsibility for any undisclosed conditions. I release VM Integral Massage Inc., its owner, and therapists from any liability for adverse effects resulting from massage therapy. By accepting this waiver today, I acknowledge that each future QR check-in visit at the spa constitutes my continued acceptance of these terms.
onboarding.contract_checkbox: I have read, understood, and accept the above release and waiver.
onboarding.error_contract: You must accept the release and waiver to continue.
onboarding.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

consent.medical_body: I certify that I am free of any ailment which might be affected by the service, test or procedure to be performed on me. I certify that to the best of my knowledge I do not have any communicable or infectious disease. I understand that if I am ill or become ill I should see my own physician and rely on his/her advice and consultation.
consent.agreement_body: I agree to participate in the massage therapy services that will be performed on me today at VM Integral Massage Inc.
consent.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cancel_membership.modal_body: This will mark {planName} as cancelled for {clientName}. The client will lose access immediately. This cannot be undone.
cancel_membership.notes_placeholder: e.g. Client requested cancellation before 6-month term
cancel_membership.error: Could not cancel the plan. Please try again.
cancel_membership.error_payment: Plan was cancelled but the fee payment could not be recorded. Please add it manually.

membership_contract.terms_body:
By signing this agreement, I commit to the following terms with VM Integral Massage Inc.:

1. MINIMUM COMMITMENT: I agree to a minimum commitment of 6 months of continuous membership. I understand I cannot cancel before completing these 6 months.

2. AUTOMATIC MONTHLY CHARGE: I authorize VM Integral Massage Inc. to charge the agreed monthly amount to my selected payment method on the same date each month for the duration of my membership.

3. CANCELLATION POLICY: If I choose to cancel my membership before completing the 6-month minimum commitment, I agree to pay a cancellation fee equal to 50% of the remaining monthly payments owed under this agreement.

4. PLAN DETAILS: The plan selected, its price, and the included services are as described at the time of signing. Any changes to plan details will be communicated with at least 30 days written notice.
membership_contract.pending_contract_subtitle: Your therapist has sent you a membership contract. Please review the terms below and sign to proceed.
membership_contract.signature_required: Please draw your signature above before signing
membership_contract.signed_body: You have signed your membership agreement. The receptionist will now process your payment.
membership_contract.declined_body: You have declined the membership agreement. Ask the receptionist if you would like to reconsider.
membership_contract.expired_body: The 30-minute window has passed. Ask the receptionist to send a new contract.
membership_contract.contract_sent_body: The contract has been sent to the client's phone. Waiting for their signature...

membership_contract.error_decline: Could not decline the contract. Please try again.
